SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.vxml
Interface VxmlDialogEvent

All Superinterfaces:
MediaEvent<VxmlDialog>
public interface VxmlDialogEvent
extends MediaEvent<VxmlDialog>

An event from a VxmlDialog. May be characterized either by qualifier or an Error.

Field Summary
static EventType DISCONNECTION_REQUESTED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter to request to be disconnected.
static EventType ERROR_EVENT
          This event is thrown when a dialog request cannot be completed (wrong internal state, ...).
static EventType EXITED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter, as a result of executing the <exit> element.
static EventType MIDCALL_EVENT_RECEIVED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter when a mid-call event arises.
static EventType PREPARED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter to signal the completion of a VxmlDialog.prepare(java.net.URL, javax.media.mscontrol.Parameters, java.util.Map) request.
static EventType STARTED
          Event sent by the vxml interpreter to signal the completion of a VxmlDialog.start(java.util.Map) request.
 
Fields inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaEvent
NO_ERROR
 
Method Summary
 java.lang.String getEventName()
          When the event qualifier is MIDCALL_EVENT_RECEIVED, this returns the event name.
 java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> getNameList()
          When the event qualifier is EXITED, this is the namelist returned by the vxml interpreter.
 
Methods inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaEvent
getError, getErrorText, getEventType, getSource, isSuccessful
 

Field Detail

PREPARED

static final EventType PREPARED
Event sent by the vxml interpreter to signal the completion of a VxmlDialog.prepare(java.net.URL, javax.media.mscontrol.Parameters, java.util.Map) request.

STARTED

static final EventType STARTED
Event sent by the vxml interpreter to signal the completion of a VxmlDialog.start(java.util.Map) request.

EXITED

static final EventType EXITED
Event sent by the vxml interpreter, as a result of executing the <exit> element.

DISCONNECTION_REQUESTED

static final EventType DISCONNECTION_REQUESTED
Event sent by the vxml interpreter to request to be disconnected.
(it is expected that the application will then terminate the dialog)

MIDCALL_EVENT_RECEIVED

static final EventType MIDCALL_EVENT_RECEIVED
Event sent by the vxml interpreter when a mid-call event arises.
Mid-call events have to be agreed upon by the VxmlDialog and the application.

ERROR_EVENT

static final EventType ERROR_EVENT
This event is thrown when a dialog request cannot be completed (wrong internal state, ...).

Method Detail

getNameList

java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> getNameList()
When the event qualifier is EXITED, this is the namelist returned by the vxml interpreter.
When the event qualifier is MIDCALL_EVENT_RECEIVED, this is the values associated to the event.

getEventName

java.lang.String getEventName()
When the event qualifier is MIDCALL_EVENT_RECEIVED, this returns the event name.
